reference: Hello, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. There are no problems associated with this. It will not cause changes in sperm production or motility, and this is not a serious issue. It may only be a sign of prostate inflammation or hypertrophy, so it would be advisable to perform a prostate ultrasound and check prostate-specific antigen levels with your urologist. I hope this answers your question. If you have additional or follow-up questions, please do not hesitate to write to us. I will be happy to answer your questions. Wishing you good health.
text: Hello. I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. There are no problems associated with this. It will not cause changes in sperm production or motility, and this is not a serious issue. It may only be a sign of prostate inflammation or hypertrophy, so it would be advisable to perform a prostate ultrasound and check prostate-specific antigen levels with your urologist. I hope this answers your question. If you have additional or follow-up questions, please do not hesitate to write to us. I will be happy to answer your questions. Wishing you good health.
